docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, DONALD SR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALDERON, LUZ  I RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, DONALD SR. UNITE AIRLINES $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $948.00, THE DAVEY TREE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. UNITED AIRLINES IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
